_comment: Hermetic fixture: returns a diagnostic setting with NO workspaceId so the Log Analytics path (which bypasses Invoke-AzRest and shells out to `az rest`) is skipped. LA query semantics are covered by unit tests; the hermetic E2E exercises run resolution, diag discovery, metrics fan-out, activity log, alerts, service health, correlation, and rendering — all routed through the stubbed Invoke-AzRest.
